name: player routes
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t0373d2db3cc41756ed863a18d6a8bdbd" as materialized (select "nfl_plays_receiver"."gsis_id", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays_receiver" inner join "nfl_plays" on "nfl_plays_receiver"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" and "nfl_plays_receiver"."playId" = "nfl_plays"."playId" where "play_type" = 'PASS' and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays_receiver"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_plays_receiver"."gsis_id") select "player"."pid", t0373d2db3cc41756ed863a18d6a8bdbd.rate_type_total_count as player_routes_0, "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t0373d2db3cc41756ed863a18d6a8bdbd" on "t0373d2db3cc41756ed863a18d6a8bdbd"."gsis_id" = "player"."gsisid" group by t0373d2db3cc41756ed863a18d6a8bdbd.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
